chunks.title: Righteous Perish in Peace
chunks.reason: Introduction describing the fate of the righteous.

chunks.title: Judgment on Idolaters
chunks.reason: Prophetic indictment against the sons of a soothsayer and their idolatry.

chunks.title: Promise of Peace and Wickedness
chunks.reason: Transition from preparing the way to God's dwelling with the lowly and final contrast between peace for the righteous and wicked.
